# Fix Report: [Short Title]
example fix report title: REP-FIX-{three-digit-index}-{slug}.md

---
doc_id: FIX-[000]
title: [Short Title]
version: 1.0.0
status: draft
created: [YYYY-MM-DD]
updated: [YYYY-MM-DD]
author: [name or agent identifier]
reviewers: none
tags: fix, bug
changelog:
- version: 1.0.0
  date: [YYYY-MM-DD]
  author: [name]
  note: Initial fix report
---

## Issue Description
[Describe the bug or issue that was fixed. What was the expected behavior vs the actual behavior? Include any error messages or reproduction steps if applicable.]

## Root Cause Analysis
[Explain the underlying reason the issue occurred in the codebase. Why did it happen?]

## Fix Implementation
[Detail the changes made to fix the issue. Which key files, functions, or modules were modified?]

## Verification & Testing
[How was the fix verified? Describe any new tests added or manual testing steps performed to ensure the bug is resolved and no regressions occurred.]
